# `SetFrequency`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, OK64  
**Parameters:** `b,b`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Sets the frequency (parameter 2) of the Nth (parameter 1) sid channel
